title: The Disappearance of Jimmy Hoffa

segments.text: In 1975, labor leader Jimmy Hoffa vanished without a trace.
He was last seen outside a Detroit restaurant.
Theories about his fate include mob involvement and betrayal.
Despite extensive searches, no evidence has ever surfaced.
The mystery of Hoffa's disappearance remains unsolved today.
A case that has puzzled investigators for decades.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1975, labor leader Jimmy Hoffa disappeared, and his case remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases! 🔍
